title: Bolton Polmateer’s CV
text:
boltonpolmateer@gmail.com | (765) 421-4539 | https://www.linkedin.com/in/bolton-polmateer/




Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho
September 2023 - December 2027

GPA: 3.97
Minor in Data Science
Relevant Coursework: Business Analytics, Statistics, Data Science (Python), SQL, Logistics, Operations Management, Spreadsheet Modeling, Accounting, Student Consulting




Fresco (Restaurant), Rexburg, Idaho
May 2025 - July 2025

Reduced food preparation times by 17% with a student team by addressing inventory, motion, and transportation waste through Lean Six Sigma practices
Built manager buy-in and rollout plan for sustaining Lean changes after project







Manufab (Metal Fabrication), Rexburg, Idaho
January 2024 - December 2025

Led early operations improvement effort by introducing one-piece flow, workflow clarity, visual controls, and 5S in absence of baseline performance data
Coordinated daily execution of a 50,000 sq ft facility build by organizing crews of 2–5, sequencing work phases, and sustaining progress with minimal supervision
Owned full fabrication lifecycle from material preparation through welding and final installation across 200,000+ lbs of custom steel projects




Wabash National (Semi-Trailer Manufacturing), Lafayette, Indiana
April 2023 - September 2023

Welded trailer components in a high-throughput manufacturing environment, following standard work and quality requirements while supporting production of 20–30 trailers per shift




The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Salt Lake City, Utah
March 2021 - April 2023

Led and trained teams of 12–22 volunteers for 18 months, coordinating outreach goals and daily execution while maintaining disciplined planning routines
Guided individuals facing addiction, depression, and major life challenges, building trust and clearly communicating complex ideas across diverse backgrounds




Civil Outfitters (Clothing Company), Lafayette, Indiana
October 2017 - June 2020

Built and operated a small business reaching customers in 18 states, doubling initial investment within two months while 16 years old






Analytics: Advanced Excel (VBA), Power BI (DAX), SQL, Python, R
Operations: Lean Six Sigma Green Belt, Statistical Process Control, Root Cause Analysis, Sigma XL
Other: Leadership, Public Speaking, Accounting Fundamentals, Arabic (In Progress)

text:

Cooling, power series, optics, alchemy, planetary motions, apples.
